message:
fix(test): pin theme in render determinism tests to prevent race

layout_lab.rs and terminal_capabilities.rs render-determinism tests
were susceptible to flaky failures when run in parallel with WCAG
contrast tests that mutate the global CURRENT_THEME via set_theme().

Pin to CyberpunkAurora before each checksum computation to ensure
stable output regardless of test execution order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
